creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 2008-04-14 at 13:07 +0700, Thomas Wahyudi wrote:
> after finish install and installer request to reboot, it stop and hang, 
> must do hard reset, after then it runing normal but it will hang at "all 
> buffers syncd, uptime xx:xx" if issue reboot command and must do hard 
> reset again

Could you please try the patch mentioned in PR amd64/122473 (using
src/sys/dev/usb/ehci_pci.c from RELENG_7) and see if that fixes things
for you?

Thanks!

Gavin
